name: mobile-game-learner
description: Generic rule-based learning layer for mobile game screen classification and next-action suggestion.
notes: Profiles stay intentionally small and are meant to be edited by hand.
Action targets can be plain tap coordinates or label-oriented tap hints.
Unknown screens should remain non-mutating until the profile is improved.

login_continue.notes: Try guest or primary login entry points first.

battle_continue.notes: Only safe for games where battle entry is repetitive and low-risk.

menu_primary.notes: Use the main progression entry point from the home/menu screen.

upgrade_confirm.notes: Only use after the upgrade screen is confidently detected.

generic.notes: Generic starter profile for unknown games. Refine the hints after observing real UI dumps.

login_continue.notes: Example only. Confirm labels from a fresh UI dump before relying on them.

maplestory_idle_example.notes: Illustrative example based on prior BlueStacks notes. Treat it as a template, not a finished bot.
